PDF-compliant scoring report
Rule: valid iff VE in [VT-|VT|*2^(-2r), VT+|VT|*2^(-2r)], VE!=0, u!=0, v!=0
This solver computes VE and VT by exact sparse correlation composition, so VE = VT.
